name: Spiced Grapefruit Upside-Down Cake
recipeIngredient: ½ cup firmly packed light brown sugar
1 grapefruit, peeled, cut into 6 cartwheel slices and well-drained
Grated peel of 1 grapefruit (yellow part only)
recipeInstructions:
To make the cake:
1. Melt the butter in a 9-inch-square baking pan while preheating the oven to 325 degrees.
2. Remove the hot baking pan from the oven; sprinkle the brown sugar evenly over the melted butter.
3. Arrange the grapefruit slices and walnut halves over the brown sugar.
4. In a large bowl, prepare the poundcake mix with the eggs and milk or water, following package directions. Add the cinnamon and cloves. Stir in the grapefruit peel. Pour the batter over the grapefruit.
5. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Run a knife around the sides of the pan; invert the cake onto a serving plate.
To make the topping:
1. In a bowl, whip the cream with powdered sugar. Stir in the grapefruit peel; chill for 10 to 15 minutes.
Note: Use real butter or stick margarine that's at least 80% fat. Do not substitute reduced-fat spreads; their higher water content often yields less satisfactory results.
Makes 8 to 9 servings
